description: 在工业化程度很高的好莱坞，直接拉拍已经杀青、等待上映的电影是很少见的，但遇到“支持者”和“对手”时，这样的事情还是可以做的。

descriptionEn: In highly industrialized Hollywood, it's rare to directly pull a film that has already been completed and is only awaiting release, but when it comes to "backers" and "rivals," such things can still be done.

Revenue structures are being re-examined, and some money, once broken down, loses its appeal.
